ValidationRule.description: Locks core fields against post-create change. Allowed-edit fields (Status, Effective dates, Confirmed Usage Count) are not listed. Bypassed by the Bypass_Promo_Code_Lock custom permission.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT($Permission.Bypass_Promo_Code_Lock), OR( ISCHANGED(Code__c), ISCHANGED(CurrencyIsoCode), ISCHANGED(Discount_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_Value__c), ISCHANGED(Total_Usage_Limit__c), ISCHANGED(Per_Member_Usage_Limit__c), ISCHANGED(Member_Type_Scope__c), ISCHANGED(Region_Scope__c), ISCHANGED(Application_Level__c), ISCHANGED(Product_Scope_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Product_Family_Scope__c), ISCHANGED(Specific_Products__c), ISCHANGED(Account__c), ISCHANGED(Combinable__c), ISCHANGED(Combination_Group__c), ISCHANGED(Display_Name__c), ISCHANGED(Terms__c), ISCHANGED(Approval_Required__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is locked after the promo code is created. Allowed updates: Status, Effective dates, and Confirmed Usage Count. To make a correction, an admin must grant the Bypass Promo Code Lock permission (or temporarily disable this rule).
